title: QA Counterfactual Descent PASS — inverted spec PASS = {satellite, singularity}; same generator set, opposite-direction flip from cosmos to satellite via scalar_mult_3
_fixture_purpose: Secondary PASS fixture for cert [265]. Declares PASS = {satellite, singularity} (the 'lower' orbit-class subset; 9 of 81 states in_PASS). For each cosmos start state, the shortest counterfactual path under declared generators {qa_step, scalar_mult_2, scalar_mult_3} is the same scalar_mult_3 application as in the primary fixture — but now the flip is in the opposite direction (cosmos in_PASS=False → satellite in_PASS=True). Demonstrates that the cert's CFD_FLIP gate is direction-agnostic: the counterfactual is the boundary-crossing move regardless of which side of the boundary 'PASS' is. Same generator set as primary fixture; different declared spec; same BFS recomputation; same path lengths. Per Will + ChatGPT scoping 2026-04-27 (file slug retained as 'pass_generator_cost_weighted_paths' to match the planned filename, but v1 keeps the unweighted-BFS scope; weighted Dijkstra deferred to v2).
source_attribution: (Kochenderfer, 2026) Algorithms for Validation §11.5 'Counterfactual Explanations'; (Dale, 2026) cert [263] qa_failure_density_enumeration_cert utility + cert [191] qa_bateson_learning_levels_cert tier hierarchy + cert [194] canonical mod-9 classifier.

counterfactual_test_cases.name: cosmos_(1,1)_to_satellite
counterfactual_test_cases.comment: same scalar_mult_3 move as primary fixture; opposite-direction flip (cosmos out-of-PASS → satellite in-PASS)

claim: On S_9 with the inverted declared PASS = {satellite, singularity} and the same v1 generator set as the primary fixture, every cosmos start state still has an exact 1-step counterfactual to satellite via scalar_mult_3. The CFD_FLIP gate verifies the direction-agnostic property: the counterfactual is the orbit-class boundary crossing in either direction. Path lengths are identical to the primary fixture (=1).
claim_scope: Same narrow scope as primary fixture. Demonstrates the cert's flip-direction-agnosticism. Generator set unchanged; only declared spec inverted.
weighted_dijkstra_status: deferred to v2 per Will + ChatGPT scoping 2026-04-27. v1 BFS unit-cost is sufficient to establish the BFS-reduction claim. Filename retained from the original ChatGPT spec for traceability; the 'cost_weighted' framing applies to v2.

witnesses.comment: cosmos witness under inverted PASS; same 1-step scalar_mult_3 move; flip direction reversed
in_PASS=True under inverted spec; no counterfactual to cosmos exists under v1 generator set (same structural feature as primary fixture)
fixed point of all v1 generators; no counterfactual exists in either spec direction
